words.meaning_en: Feeling joy or pleasure
words.example_sentence: She was happy to receive a gift.

words.meaning_en: Feeling unhappy or sorrowful
words.example_sentence: He felt sad when his pet dog died.

words.meaning_en: Feeling strong displeasure or rage
words.example_sentence: She was angry when someone broke her pencil.

words.meaning_en: Feeling fear or worry
words.example_sentence: He was afraid of the dark.

words.meaning_en: Feeling very enthusiastic and eager
words.example_sentence: The children were excited about the field trip.

words.meaning_en: Feeling sudden shock or wonder
words.example_sentence: She was surprised by the birthday party.

words.meaning_en: Feeling a need to rest or sleep after effort
words.example_sentence: He was tired after the long walk.

words.meaning_en: Feeling uninterested and restless
words.example_sentence: She was bored during the long train journey.

words.meaning_en: Eager to know or learn something
words.example_sentence: She was curious about how aeroplanes fly.

words.meaning_en: Feeling sure about your own abilities
words.example_sentence: He was confident before his speech.

words.meaning_en: Nervous or uncomfortable with others
words.example_sentence: The shy girl sat quietly in the corner.

words.meaning_en: Ready to face danger without fear
words.example_sentence: The brave boy saved the cat from drowning.

words.meaning_en: Willing to give more than expected
words.example_sentence: She was generous and shared her lunch.

words.meaning_en: Truthful and not likely to cheat or lie
words.example_sentence: An honest student returned the lost wallet.

words.meaning_en: Behaving in a respectful and kind way
words.example_sentence: Always be polite to your elders.

words.meaning_en: Unwilling to work or make an effort
words.example_sentence: The lazy student did not finish his homework.

words.meaning_en: Truthful and not likely to cheat
words.example_sentence: The honest boy returned the purse he found.

words.meaning_en: Feeling unhappy because someone else has what you want
words.example_sentence: He felt jealous when his friend won the prize.

words.meaning_en: Feeling thankful for something kind that someone did
words.example_sentence: She was grateful for her teacher's help.

words.meaning_en: Feeling pleased and satisfied about something you or others have done
words.example_sentence: His parents were proud of his achievements.

words.meaning_en: Feeling shy or ashamed in front of others
words.example_sentence: She felt embarrassed when she forgot her lines.

words.meaning_en: Feeling worried or anxious about something
words.example_sentence: She felt nervous before going on stage.

words.meaning_en: Feeling happy that a worry or danger has gone away
words.example_sentence: He was relieved when he found his lost bag.

words.meaning_en: Feeling sad because you have no company
words.example_sentence: She felt lonely on her first day at the new school.

words.meaning_en: Unable to understand or think clearly
words.example_sentence: She was confused by the difficult question.

words.meaning_en: Not excited or upset; peaceful and relaxed
words.example_sentence: He stayed calm during the storm.
